article_theme: A comprehensive benchmark analysis of Nvidia and AMD AI inference performance, highlighting how software stack maturity—specifically regarding advanced techniques like disaggregated prefill and wide expert parallelism—dictates real-world hardware capabilities and Total Cost of Ownership (TCO).
structure_summary: The article opens by introducing the InferenceXv2 benchmark and thanking contributors. It then provides a technical primer on core LLM inference concepts (interactivity vs throughput, TP/EP/DP). The core sections dissect benchmark results for DeepSeek R1 and GPT-OSS across Nvidia and AMD hardware, highlighting the impact of frameworks, disaggregated serving, and WideEP. It transitions into an analysis of AMD's software shortcomings (composability, ATOM engine) and explains advanced techniques (MTP, Anthropic Fast Mode). Finally, it details InferenceX's internal updates, AI usage, and future roadmap, concluding with TCO comparisons.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Metadata and thematic anchor. Establishes the highly technical nature of the piece and outlines the specific hardware and software scope.
translation_notes: Do not translate hardware SKUs or software framework names (e.g., SGLang, vLLM, TRTLLM).
Retain 'Disaggregated Serving' and 'Wide Expert Parallelism' in English on first use, followed by standard industry translations (e.g., 分离式服务, 宽专家并行).

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.section_role: Establishes credibility and methodology. Introduces InferenceXv2 as a dynamic, open-source benchmark tool rather than a static report.
translation_notes: Contrast 'point-in-time' (静态/特定时间点) with 'continuous tests' (持续性测试) clearly.
Ensure the call to action ('drop a star') sounds natural to developers (e.g., 在GitHub上点个Star).

sections.title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.next_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: The core thesis and executive summary of the benchmark findings. Highlights Nvidia's software dominance and AMD's specific architectural pain points.
translation_notes: 'Framemog' is hardcore tech/gaming slang for absolute dominance. Translate with equivalent impact, e.g., '绝对碾压' or '降维打击'.
'Composability' is a critical technical keyword here; translate as '可组合性' and ensure the context of combining software optimizations is clear.

sections.title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters

sections.next_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.section_role: Transparency and scale validation. Discloses hardware sources while emphasizing the massive scale of independent testing.
translation_notes: Maintain a professional, appreciative tone for the acknowledgments.
Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' accurately as '推动帕累托前沿' (signifying optimal trade-offs in multi-objective optimization).

sections.title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.previous_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Structural signpost. Warns advanced readers they can skip ahead while preparing novices for heavy technical jargon.
translation_notes: Translate 'primer' as '入门指南' or '基础概念科普'. Keep the tone helpful and instructional.

sections.title: Interactivity vs Throughput Tradeoff
sections.previous_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.next_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Defines the core economic and performance metrics that dictate Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) in LLM serving.
translation_notes: Ensure precise translation of metrics: 'Interactivity' (交互性/响应速度), 'Throughput' (吞吐量), 'TPOT' (每个输出token耗时).
Translate 'Disaggregated prefill' as 'Prefill分离' or '解耦Prefill', and 'decode phases' as '解码阶段'.

sections.title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the distributed computing techniques used to optimize the latency/throughput tradeoffs across GPU clusters.
translation_notes: Strictly adhere to standard distributed training/inference terminology: 'all-reduce' (全归约), 'all-to-all collective' (全对全集合通信), 'shards experts' (专家分片).

sections.title: Tracking Improvements Over Time
sections.previous_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Justifies the continuous nature of the benchmark by contrasting slow hardware release cycles with rapid software iteration.
translation_notes: The O(...) notation is used metaphorically for time complexity. Translate 'O(yearly)' and 'O(weekly)' as '以年为周期(量级)' and '以周为周期(量级)'.

sections.title: DeepSeek R1
sections.section_role: Provides a concrete case study demonstrating the massive impact of software updates on a SOTA model's performance on AMD hardware.
translation_notes: Translate 'upstreaming' accurately as '向上游合并' or '推送到上游主干'.
Distinguish clearly between 'forked SGLang images' (分支/衍生镜像) and the 'official SGLang image' (官方镜像).
